summary: Outputs a solid-color texture. Useful as backgrounds, masks, or as a base for further processing. Can also generate 3D textures and 2D arrays directly (2025.30000+).

key_params.name: texturetype
key_params.note: 2025.30000+: 2D / 2D Array / 3D Texture — pick the destination format directly

key_params.name: depth
key_params.note: 2025.30000+: depth (slices) when texturetype is 3D Texture or 2D Array

common_gotchas: Alpha defaults to 1; set it to 0 if you need a transparent base for compositing.
2025.30000+: setting `texturetype` to 3D Texture or 2D Array also requires the consuming downstream op to accept that format — most TOPs were upgraded for this in the same build.
